_description: R2 REGRESSION GUARD (v1.1 §5.2): each band previously unreachable under v1.0 must now be reachable. Under v1.0, minimal qualifying evidence (Σ=2.0) landed mid-band, so 3.1–4.2, 5.6–6.3 and 7.6–8.3 could never occur. The v1.1 Q offset (position = min(1, max(0, (Σ−Q)/(K−Q)))) makes each band floor reachable with minimal qualifying evidence.

signals.excerpt: I wrote purpose statements for our volunteer roles.
I set basic program goals around headcount.

dimensions._score_calc: Σ dev+ = 2.0; Q=2.0, K=4.0 → position = 0 → score = 3.1 (band floor)
dimensions._band: 3.1–4.2 — unreachable under v1.0, reachable under v1.1

signals.excerpt: Training depth must match role risk because failure modes differ.
For tech-averse volunteers I redesign training to use paper job aids.

dimensions._score_calc: Σ prof+ = 2.0 (S2 at developing anchor excluded); Q=2.0, K=5.0 → position = 0 → score = 5.6 (band floor)
dimensions._band: 5.6–6.3 — unreachable under v1.0, reachable under v1.1

signals.excerpt: I designed a strategic volunteer engagement framework with capacity planning.
I mentor peer volunteer managers on strategic design.
Mission-linked roles recruit better because values alignment is explicit.

dimensions._score_calc: Σ expert+ = 2.0; Q=2.0, K=6.0 → position = 0 → score = 7.6 (band floor)
dimensions._band: 7.6–8.3 — unreachable under v1.0, reachable under v1.1
